markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and define a new, hub-based site structure.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Site Structure:** Adopted a hub-and-spoke model for content (Pillar Pages, Model Hub, Competitors) to improve user experience and consolidate SEO value.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Shift:** Prioritizing new content for the Model Hub and "Eval Engineering" cluster, while pushing competitor articles to next week to fully digest new product marketing assets.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - **Performance:** Monthly reporting is now standard. The Model Hub is volatile due to low page count, but existing blog pages are already ranking \#1 for key "model vs." keywords, validating the hub's potential.
  - [**Team Update:** Conor Bronsdon announced his departure from Galileo next week.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Strategy

  - [**Production Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
      - [Staged: 4 articles last week, 5 in queue.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
      - [In Review: 8 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
      - [Delivery: 5 articles this week.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [**Performance Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
      - [Reporting is now monthly for better trend analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
      - [Overall traffic is trending up.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
      - [The Model Hub is volatile due to a low page count.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
      - **Key Insight:** Existing blog pages are already ranking \#1 for "model vs." keywords (e.g., DeepSeek vs. O1), validating the Model Hub's future traffic potential.
      - [Competitor Arise is losing keywords at the same rate as Galileo.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
      - [LLM referral traffic increased, with GPT remaining the top referrer.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [**Strategy Shift:**](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
      - [**Priority:** Shift focus from competitor articles to new content for the Model Hub and the "Eval Engineering" cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This allows the team to fully digest new product marketing assets before redrafting competitor content.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)

### New Site Structure: Hub-and-Spoke Model

  - [**Problem:** The current flat site structure is difficult to navigate and dilutes SEO value across many individual pages.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [**Solution:** Adopt a hub-and-spoke model to create cohesive user journeys and consolidate SEO authority.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [**Implementation Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
      - [**Pillar Pages:** Create a central index page for all pillars.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Provides a cohesive learning pathway, setting up the December course launch.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
          - [**New Structure:** Consolidate subtopics (e.g., "AI Agent Evaluation") under a single parent pillar page ("AI Evaluation") to prevent navigation sprawl.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
      - [**Model Hub:** Create a central index page for all model comparisons.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Consolidates traffic and SEO value as the hub grows.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
      - [**Competitor Hub:** Create a central index page for all competitor comparisons.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Essential by Q1 2026, when the number of pages is projected to reach \~20.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
          - [**Model:** Use the Gusto competitor page as a template, adapting its structure (e.g., summary tables) while avoiding its poor UX (e.g., overly long case studies).](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Technical Note:** Jackson will consult the web dev agency on Framer's limitations for implementing this new structure.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)

### Team Update: Conor Bronsdon's Departure

  - [Conor Bronsdon announced his departure from Galileo, with his last day being next week.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
  - [He will take a break before starting a new role in December.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [He shared his personal contact info to stay in touch.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
      - [Push competitor articles to next week.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
      - [Prioritize content for the Model Hub and "Eval Engineering" cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [Queue up the "AI Guardrails" pillar page with a hub-and-spoke structure.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
  - [**Jackson:**](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
      - [Consult the web dev agency on implementing the new hub-and-spoke structure in Framer.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
      - [Provide mock-ups for the competitor hub based on the Gusto template.](https://fathom.video/share/sJiSgQRqc8s3Gy9z9Mu1JyzW87bvvqpA?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
